text:
Once upon a time, there was a lazy kitten.

She wouldn't play outside. She wouldn't even purr. She just sat there, watching the sun.

One day, a friendly squirrel came to visit.

The squirrel spoke, "Oh dear. You're such a sleepyhead."

With a sleepy purr, the kitten agreed.

The squirrel thought a squirrel ball looked tasty.

And off he went!

Back at the window, the sleepy cat thought a mouse looked funny.

So she chased it!

And the mouse?

Well, the brave squirrel was a big red flagpole!

The brave mouse?

The squirrel flew.

And the squirrel won! It ate a whole squirrel on a branch!

Then the squirrel came back.

He was hungry.
